summary: Iteration 60 - All 8 user-reported bugs verified as FIXED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All fixes verified via Playwright testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix 1: Caroline Maerten duplicate removed - Only 1 transaction for 6 WEEKS CHALLENGE in March (300 CHF on 2026-03-07)
Fix 2: SALAIRES COACH category migrated to SALAIRES COACHS - 8 transactions now use correct category, old category deleted
Fix 3: Recurring revenue includes all billing members (84 items) including coaches; recurring expense has 9 category items
Fix 4: Funnel cash_collected corrected to 300 CHF (was 4762)
Fix 5: Bilans 60j counter uses stats.next60Days - shows correct count on dashboard
Fix 6: Late bilans visible - Bouchra Talaat (2025-10-01) shows 'En retard' status on dashboard
Fix 7: /api/recurring-transactions/all returns 93 items (84 billing + 9 category sources)
Fix 8: AddTransactionModal has is_recurring toggle that creates recurring_transactions template
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_RECURRING_TX_60 transaction and recurring template during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified all 8 user-reported bug fixes: (1) Caroline Maerten appears only once in March transactions with 6 WEEKS CHALLENGE; (2) SALAIRES COACH migrated to SALAIRES COACHS - no old category exists; (3) KPI details recurring_revenue has 84 billing members, recurring_expense has 9 categories; (4) funnel cash = 300 CHF; (5) Bilans page uses stats.next60Days for counter; (6) Overdue bilans show 'En retard' (1 overdue: Bouchra Talaat); (7) /recurring-transactions/all returns 93 items from billing+category sources; (8) AddTransactionModal has 'Dépense récurrente' toggle.

Fix1_Caroline_No_Duplicate.evidence: Found 1 Caroline Maerten/6 WEEKS CHALLENGE transaction in March: 2026-03-07, 300 CHF

Fix2_SALAIRES_COACH_Migrated.evidence: SALAIRES COACH not in categories, SALAIRES COACHS exists with 8 transactions

Fix5_Bilans_60j_Counter.evidence: Upcoming reviews (60 days): 4, dashboard shows correct count

Fix6_Late_Bilans_Visible.evidence: Overdue reviews: 1 (Bouchra Talaat: 2025-10-01), shows 'En retard' on dashboard

Fix8_Recurring_Toggle_Modal.evidence: data-testid='tx-recurring-toggle' found, modal shows 'Dépense récurrente' option
